page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6t.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, utilizing a 1-to-1 thread-to-core ratio. The underlying hardware is driven by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor operating at a base frequency of 2.5 GHz. This configuration provides dedicated CPU allocation, ensuring consistent compute performance without resource sharing or virtualization overhead from hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps, which facilitates steady data transfer rates for standard network operations.

Given its balanced resource profile, the ecs.g6t.8xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring dedicated CPU execution and a standard memory-to-core ratio. The lack of hyperthreading makes it suitable for compute tasks sensitive to resource contention, though the absence of local storage and hardware accelerators represents a tradeoff for storage-heavy or machine learning workloads. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, web serving, application servers, and moderate database workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6t.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs and 32 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, it delivers dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading. The instance includes 128.0 GB of RAM, maintaining a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. It does not feature local storage or GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. This resource configuration makes the instance suitable for general-purpose workloads, application hosting, and web serving where dedicated CPU performance and standard memory density are required.
